---
title: "Emilie Thal Wigan"
---

## Emilie Thal Wigan

**Dates:** (b.Kent 1832/3)

**Maiden name:** (Brandram)

### Description

wife of the Rev. Alfred Wigan

### Biography

She married (1855) the Rev. Alfred Wigan (b.1818), Rector of Luddesdown;  they had six daughters and employed a governess during the 1881 census.

### Letters

- Letter from Novr 18th 1876

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
